proposal1.heroHeadline: Brothership is burning 1,200 hours a year on proposals. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, creating a proposal for your film craftsmanship takes hours. With our system, it's ready in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every minute spent on proposals is a minute not spent creating great videos.

problems.title: Wasted Creative Energy
problems.description: 150 hours per year lost on proposal writing means less time for your team to create compelling videos. This translates to missed opportunities in showcasing Brothership's unique film craftsmanship.

problems.title: Delayed Client Responses
problems.description: Manual proposal generation delays responses by up to 48 hours, potentially costing Brothership 5% of annual revenue. Every delay risks losing a client to competitors.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Proposal drafting consumes over 300 hours annually. At an average cost of $50/hour, Brothership spends $15,000 that could be reinvested into production.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistent branding, weakening Brothership's image as Miami's top-rated video company. Inconsistencies can cost up to 10% in client trust.

problems.title: Missed Deadlines
problems.description: Manual processes lead to missed proposal deadlines, risking $50,000 in lost contracts annually. Timeliness is crucial in securing new projects.

problems.title: Inefficient Tracking
problems.description: Without automated tracking, follow-ups fall through the cracks. This inefficiency can result in a 20% lower conversion rate for Brothership.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these inefficiencies with speed and precision.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to craft. Our system delivers them in under 60 seconds, freeing up your team for creative work.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistencies mar manual proposals. Our system ensures every proposal matches Brothership's top-rated brand instantly.

solutions.title: Automated Tracking
solutions.description: Following up on proposals is manual and error-prone. Our system tracks and notifies, ensuring no opportunity is missed.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: Current methods waste labor hours and money. Our system saves both, letting you reinvest in your core video production business.

solutions.title: Faster Client Responses
solutions.description: Manual processes delay client communication. Our system accelerates it, improving Brothership's chances to close deals swiftly.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Brothership's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Brothership around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Brothership.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Reach with Brothership's Film Craftsmanship.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will create compelling visual stories to captivate your audience and drive measurable results. Our plan integrates seamlessly with your brand's vision.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently losing potential revenue due to several critical issues.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. With a bounce rate of 70%, potential customers are not engaging with your content.

problems.title: Weak Brand Presence
problems.description: Without a strong brand presence, Acme Corp is missing out on market opportunities. Your current visibility is limited, resulting in a 30% lower brand recall among target demographics.

problems.title: Outdated Visual Content
problems.description: With visual content that doesn't resonate, you're losing the interest of modern consumers. This results in a 40% reduction in engagement on digital platforms.

problems.title: Ineffective Advertising Spend
problems.description: Without strategic ad placements, Acme Corp is wasting 20% of its advertising budget. This inefficiency leads to fewer conversions and lower ROI.

problems.title: Inconsistent Customer Experience
problems.description: A disjointed customer journey is costing repeat business. Acme Corp faces a 15% lower customer retention rate due to inconsistent messaging.

problems.title: Lack of Social Media Strategy
problems.description: Without a cohesive strategy, social media is underutilized. Acme Corp is missing out on a 25% increase in potential customer interactions.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Brothership's solutions directly address these challenges, reversing these losses.

solutions.title: Film Production
solutions.description: Create captivating visual content that resonates with your audience. This will reduce bounce rates and enhance brand engagement.

solutions.title: Strategic Advertising
solutions.description: Optimize your advertising spend with targeted placements. This will improve ROI and drive more conversions.

solutions.title: Brand Development
solutions.description: Strengthen your brand presence with consistent and powerful messaging. This will increase brand recall and market reach.

solutions.title: Social Media Strategy
solutions.description: Develop a cohesive social media strategy to increase customer interactions. This will leverage digital platforms for greater engagement.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Brothership is your partner in crafting compelling stories and building brand loyalty.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach
whyUsCards.description: We work with you as partners, ensuring your vision is realized through creative collaboration.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: With years of experience, our projects consistently deliver results that exceed client expectations.

whyUsCards.title: Expert Craftsmanship
whyUsCards.description: Our team excels in film production, bringing your brand stories to life with creativity and precision.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Focus
whyUsCards.description: Your success is our success. We prioritize your goals and work tirelessly to achieve them.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that will guide your project.

team.name: Charlie Lebess
team.bio: Charlie leads strategy and client relationships at Brothership. With a keen eye for detail and a commitment to excellence, he ensures every project aligns with client goals.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: We dive into your brand, understanding your goals and challenges.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Craft a tailored strategy that aligns with your vision.

process.title: Execution & Production
process.description: Bring the strategy to life with our expert team.

process.title: Optimization & Reporting
process.description: Refine strategies based on performance data.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Choose the investment option that best fits your needs.

pricing.name: Starter Package
pricing.description: Ideal for businesses looking to enhance their online presence.

pricing.name: Growth Package
pricing.description: Recommended for businesses aiming for significant growth.

pricing.name: Enterprise Package
pricing.description: For large enterprises seeking extensive market impact.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Reach out for a casual conversation about how we can work together.

lead.company_description: We're a full-service video agency, deployed around the world at a moment's notice to transform brand and business directives into compelling film work. We're passionate about taking projects from start to finish, or plugging into any aspect of production as needed, for clients of all sizes.
